儿.wiki_summary: Pictogram of an infant with an imperfect cranium (fontanelle).

原.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound: 泉 (spring) + 厂 (cliff) – a spring bursting from a cliff-side, meaning origin/source.

东.wiki_summary: Pictogram of a full container tied at both ends; the sun-in-tree (日+木) reading is described as folk etymology.
东.difference: Our data classifies 東 as a compound_ideograph (sun between trees), but Wiktionary identifies the original form as a pictograph of a tied bundle, explicitly calling the ideogrammic interpretation folk etymology.

声.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: phonetic 殸 + semantic 耳 (ear).

提.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 扌 (hand) + phonetic 是.

立.wiki_summary: Pictogram of a person standing on the ground.

及.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound: 人 (person) + 又 (hand) – a hand grabbing a person.

比.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound: 人 (man) + 人 – two people juxtaposed.
比.difference: Our note describes components as two 匕; Wiktionary identifies them as two 人. Formation type agrees.

员.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound: 〇 indicating the round top edge of a 鼎 (ritual vessel) – originally meaning round/circular.
员.difference: Our data classifies 員 as phono_semantic_compound (貝 + 口 phonetic), but Wiktionary classifies it as an ideogrammic compound depicting the circular rim of a ding vessel.

解.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound: 角 (horn) + 刀 (knife) + 牛 (cow) – a knife separating a horn from a cow.
